ogTitle: Unumgar vs Upper Bingara: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Unumgar and Upper Bingara.
heading: Unumgar vs Upper Bingara — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Unumgar, New South Wales and Upper Bingara, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Upper Bingara has a lower overall climate risk score (40/100) compared to Unumgar (40/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Unumgar or Upper Bingara safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Unumgar has a flood risk score of 52/100, while Upper Bingara scores 54/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Unumgar scores 53/100 for bushfire risk. Upper Bingara scores 18/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Unumgar or Upper Bingara?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Upper Bingara has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.52% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
